name: Philosopher's stone (lapis philosophorum): the completed alchemical agent that transmutes base metals to gold and confers immortality. FSPLIT: the stone projects its virtue onto base metal, splitting the metal's nature into its pure essence and its dross. FFUSE: the pure essence reconstitutes as gold — the original metal perfected. VINIT: undifferentiated prima materia. TANCH: the stone itself as terminal object. AFWD: transmutation. AREV: the stone's self-regeneration — it is not consumed. ENGAGR: the stone is simultaneously a powder (physical) and a spirit (non-physical) — it is and is not material.

phase_0.domain_name: Philosopher's stone (lapis philosophorum): the completed alchemical agent that transmutes base metals to gold and confers immortality. FSPLIT: the stone projects its virtue onto base metal, splitting the metal's nature into its pure essence and its dross. FFUSE: the pure essence reconstitutes as gold — the original metal perfected. VINIT: undifferentiated prima materia. TANCH: the stone itself as terminal object. AFWD: transmutation. AREV: the stone's self-regeneration — it is not consumed. ENGAGR: the stone is simultaneously a powder (physical) and a spirit (non-physical) — it is and is not material.
phase_0.boundary_condition: the stone itself as terminal anchor that contains and closes the alchemical system

VINIT.justification: undifferentiated initial matter before any alchemical operation; the void state from which the stone emerges

TANCH.justification: the completed agent that serves as the terminal boundary of the alchemical work; it contains the entire system and is the goal

AFWD.justification: forward directed transformation from base metal to gold via the stone's projection

AREV.justification: the stone is not consumed in transmutation; it returns to its original state, a reverse descent back to itself

CLINK.chosen_element: the sequence: projection → separation → purification → fusion
CLINK.justification: composition of alchemical stages chained together to complete the work

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: the stone's self-knowledge as the perfected agent
IMSCRIB.justification: the stone recognizes itself as both the means and the end; identity of the completed work

FSPLIT.chosen_element: the stone's projection onto base metal
FSPLIT.justification: splits the base metal's nature into pure essence (soul) and dross (impurity)

FFUSE.chosen_element: reconstitution of pure essence into gold
FFUSE.justification: the pure essence, separated from dross, fuses into gold — the original metal perfected

EVALF.chosen_element: dross remains unseparated or metal unchanged

ENGAGR.chosen_element: the stone as both powder and spirit
ENGAGR.justification: paradox: it is simultaneously a physical substance (powder) and a non-physical essence (spirit); both states held without resolution

IFIX.chosen_element: the record of a completed transmutation
IFIX.justification: permanent, irreversible fixation: once gold is made, it cannot be unmade; the work is fixed in the material world

phase_2.split_element: the stone's projection onto base metal
phase_2.fuse_element: reconstitution of pure essence into gold

phase_3.void_description: prima materia — unformed potential before any operation
phase_3.both_description: the stone as powder and spirit simultaneously

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: the alchemist recognizes the stone as the goal — self-recognition of the work
Step 2 AREV: the alchemist descends into the prima materia, reversing from the goal to the start
Step 3 FSPLIT: projection of the stone onto base metal, splitting it into essence and dross
Step 4 AFWD: the pure essence ascends toward gold through purification
Step 5 FFUSE: the pure essence fuses into gold — the metal is perfected
Step 6 CLINK: the stages of projection, separation, purification, and fusion are composed into a single operation
Step 7 IFIX: the gold is fixed permanently as a record of the transmutation
Step 8 IMSCRIB: the stone recognizes itself again — the work is complete and identity restored

phase_5.compiler_frontend: the alchemist's intention and knowledge that directs the operation
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: the projection of the stone's virtue onto the metal — communication of essence
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the stone itself stores the pattern of perfection; the gold records the success
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the alchemical stages in order: nigredo, albedo, citrinitas, rubedo
phase_5.alfs_store: the Emerald Tablet — the canonical bootstrap store for alchemical knowledge

phase_6.cycle_cost: the stone's virtue is projected but not consumed; no net loss
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the stone regenerates fully, and the transmutation conserves the stone's essence; only the metal's form changes, not the underlying prima materia
